---
title: "Quarto Tips & Tricks"
subtitle: "Going further with Quarto"
sidebar: tips-sidebar
filters:
  - parmsam/quizdown
---

Welcome to the advanced section of this tutorial.
By now you know how to build websites, exercise sheets, and books with Quarto — and you have seen what interactive content looks like.
This section goes deeper: advanced YAML configuration, code chunk control, extensions, multilanguage projects, custom styles, and a reference cheatsheet.

---

## What you should already know

Before diving in, make sure you are comfortable with the following:

| Topic | Where to review |
|---|---|
| Creating a Quarto website | [Getting Started → Website](../../int/Qmd Files/Getting Started/beg_website_1.html) |
| Creating exercise sheets and books | [Getting Started → Exercise Sheet](../../int/Qmd Files/Getting Started/beg_exercise_1.html) |
| Running Python code in the browser | [Getting Started → Extensions](../../int/Qmd Files/Getting Started/beg_extensions.html) |
| What Quarto output looks like | [Example Page](../../beg/Qmd Files/Example Page/index_beg.html) |

---

## What's in this section?

::: {.grid}

→ [The YML File](exp_yml.qmd)

::: {.g-col-6}

Master code chunk options, conditional content, cross-references, and custom divs.

::: {.g-col-6}

Full syntax reference for quizdown, Pyodide, JSXGraph, and py-exercise.

:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### 🌍 Multilanguage
Build projects that serve content in multiple languages using profiles.

→ [Multilanguage Projects](exp_multilanguage.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### 🎨 Styles & CSS
Customize the look of your site using themes, SCSS variables, and Bootstrap class overrides.

→ [Styles & CSS](exp_styles.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### 📋 Cheatsheet
Everything at a glance — YML options, chunk options, CSS tricks.

→ [Cheatsheet](exp_cheatsheet.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Quick knowledge check

How well do you remember what Quarto can do?

```{quizdown}
---
shuffleAnswers: true
shuffleQuestions: false
---

# Which file controls the global configuration of a Quarto project?

1. [x] `_quarto.yml`
2. [ ] `index.qmd`
3. [ ] `styles.css`
4. [ ] `quarto.config.js`

# Which output format does Quarto NOT support natively?

1. [ ] HTML
2. [ ] PDF
3. [ ] Word (.docx)
4. [x] `.xlsx` (Excel spreadsheet)

# What does the `freeze: auto` setting do?

1. [x] Re-executes code only when the source file changes
2. [ ] Prevents all code from running
3. [ ] Freezes the page layout at a fixed width
4. [ ] Disables live preview

# Which extension enables Python to run directly in the browser?

1. [x] Pyodide
2. [ ] py-exercise
3. [ ] quizdown
4. [ ] JSXGraph

# What is the purpose of a Quarto profile?

1. [x] To apply different configurations for different build variants
2. [ ] To manage user login sessions
3. [ ] To create author profile pages
4. [ ] To set a dark/light theme toggle
```
